content_body: My friends and I came up for a weekend girls trip and we had a blast! The cabin is beautiful, and the views are breathtaking. We took advantage of the swing and enjoyed both sunrises and sunsets under a bundle of blankets. We took a drive and hiked Long Creek Falls, which ended with a beautiful waterfall. overall, such an incredible and relaxing trip! We will be back!
title: Incredible and Relaxing Girls Trip
